business_name: Oasis Pool Service Orange County CA
taglines: Here to make your life easier!
about_text: Oasis Pool Services is a commercial pool service provider in Southern California, emphasizing continuous improvement, professionalism, and dependability. A family owned & operated small business serving HOAs, apartment buildings, mobile home parks, hotels, and communities throughout Orange County. Our uniformed technicians and marked service vehicles reflect our professional standards. We assign consistent technicians for regular clients.
stats: With over a million swimming pool service calls over the past 16 years in CA

services.name: Pool Service & Maintenance
services.description: Routine upkeep including vacuuming, sweeping, tile cleaning, algae removal, surface skimming, strainer box cleaning, chemical testing and pH balancing, water level refilling, filter backwashing, chemical feeder maintenance, equipment checks (pumps, filters, disinfectant systems, gauges), and safety gate inspections.

services.name: Commercial Pool Services
services.description: Comprehensive commercial pool care for HOAs, apartment/condo complexes, commercial properties, and community pools. We take the hassle out of maintenance, compliance and repairs.

services.name: Repairs & Remodels
services.description: Pool renovations, filtration system replacements, pump/filter upgrades, and projects of any size.

services.name: Scheduled Maintenance
services.description: Quarterly and bi-monthly services including filter disassembly and acid washing, tank cleaning, diatomaceous earth replacement, chlorinator servicing, total dissolved solids testing, and safety equipment inspections (gates, locks, lights).
